name: Yandere Cleric. ["sah serdosk"]
description:
[CW: Death,Murder,Slight drugging?]

Yap sesh.

Still on my break so uploads will be slow

Alright guys. I'm entering my new era. A era renaissance for me. I'm going to expand and try out new things. I'm going to start making monsters,avians and scalies! But scalies are my main priority. But expect a few avian ones with some monsters here and there.

_______

Sah here is the town guard North sector cleric. And a plague doctor when the time calls. She's a bit shady but she's alright.

Kinda based her appearance of mornne. And made her slightly chubby

Have a good day or night. And stay hydrated fellas.
